title: Vivecraft Boots & Claws Disabler
description: A lightweight Datapack that disables both the Climb Claws and Jump Boots recipes
body:
### What does it do?
This lightweight Datapack overrides Vivecraft's Recipe folder and effectively removes both the Climbing Claws and Jump Boots, making them uncraftable and restricting them from survival players. They are still accessible through the creative inventory.

### ...Why?
I like to install Vivecraft on servers that I create for me and my friends to play on, just in case we decide to play in VR. Most of the time, we do not play in VR and, as such, find Climbing Claws and Jump Boots to be useless. This wouldn't be too much of a problem in most cases—just don’t craft them... _right?_ ...Well, Climbing Claws can be used to shear sheep, as they are simply retextured shears with infinite durability.

Vivecraft doesn't provide an option to completely remove the two items, only to disable their abilities in VR, which once again makes them even more useless.
I uploaded this pack to offer an easy fix for people who might be in a similar position to mine.

### Pack Permissions
This Datapack is so lightweight that it literally lacks a data folder. You have **FULL** permission to reupload this Datapack anywhere you want, and you do not need to give credit... though it would be appreciated! :D

### Help! Something Broke!
If theres any issues with the datapack, just throw me an @ in the [Vivecraft Discord Off-topic channel](https://discord.gg/qe5tQju4dT)
